scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['client/dist','server/dist'].forEach(d=>{try{fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Cleaned:',d)}catch(e){}})" && cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const distPath=path.join('server','dist','index.js');if(fs.existsSync(distPath)){const content=fs.readFileSync(distPath,'utf8');if(content.includes('v2.1.0-FIXED')){console.log('✅ NEW CODE VERSION FOUND in dist');}else{console.log('❌ WARNING: Old code version in dist');process.exit(1);}}else{console.log('❌ ERROR: dist/index.js not found');process.exit(1);}"
scripts.start: cd server && export BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || node -e "console.log(new Date().toISOString())") && node dist/index.js
scripts.install-all: npm run install-server && npm run install-client
scripts.lint: cd server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd server && npm run lint:fix && cd ../client && npm run lint:fix
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd client && npm test
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "cd server && npm run test:watch" "cd client && npm run test:watch"
scripts.type-check: cd server && npm run type-check && cd client && npm run type-check
